name: Alive & Well Natural Health Emporium
description: Health food shop with deli & juice bar inside. Stock includes supplements, vitamins, organic grocery, snack foods, environmentally friendly products, frozen and chilled food, and a small fresh produce section.Open Mon-Fri 8:00am-7:00pm, Sat 8:00am-6:00pm, Sun 10:00am-5:00pm.
